_comment: Sankat-Mochan LoRa gateway. Copy to config.json and edit. Every value here can be overridden by an env var of the same dotted path, upper-cased with '.' -> '__' and prefixed SANKAT_ (e.g. SANKAT_LORA__TX_POWER_DBM=10).

field._comment: Radio A — moves to the UNO Q in the disaster zone later. Verified wiring.

gateway._comment: Radio B — stays at the relief camp with the Pi. Verified wiring.

ble._peers_comment: There is no peer list any more. Phones are matched by the role they picked in the app, which they broadcast in their advertisement: every RESPONDER attaches to the gateway radio, everyone else to the field radio. Pinning by MAC would not work anyway — Android rotates its Bluetooth address between runs.

uplink._comment: POST each envelope the gateway node accepts to the AI-PC dashboard. Never put secrets here; use env vars.

voice._comment: Pi-side of the voice NACK repair loop. When gateway reassembly stalls, we ask the victim phone to resend the pieces the LoRa hop dropped. node_id is this gateway's 4-char requester id on the mesh (alnum, <=4 chars; keep it distinct from any phone id). nack_quiet_s is how long a clip must be silent before we ask again (a touch longer than the phone's 3s so phone-to-phone repair goes first).
